sections.paragraph:
κόφινος, ου, ὁ (Aristoph., X.+; ins, pap; Judg 6:19 B; Ps 80:7; ParJer; loanw. in Lat. s. Juvenal below) basket, in the NT prob. a large, heavy basket, probably of var. sizes, for carrying things (s. Juvenal 3, 14; 6, 542; RHorn, Lutheran Quarterly 1, ’49, 301; FHort, JTS 10, 1909, 567ff; Artem. 2, 24; Jos., Bell. 3, 95) Mt 14:20; Mk 6:43; Lk 9:17; J 6:13. W. σφυρίς (Mt 16:10; Mk 8:20; cp. on this APF 6, 1920, 220 no. 8, 4f [III b.c.] Φίλωνι κόφινοι β´, Πτολεμαίῳ σφυρίδιον) Mt 16:9; Mk 8:19. κ. κοπρίων a basket of manure Lk 13:8 D (Nicol. Dam.: 90 Fgm. 66, 13 Jac. κόπρον ἐν κοφίνῳ).—B. 623. DELG. M-M.

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

ParJer ParJer = Paraleipomena Jeremiou, II? a.d.—List 2

loanw. loanw. = loanword

Lat. Lat. = Latin

NT NT = New Testament

prob. prob. = probable, probably

var. var. = various(ly)

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

APF APF = Archiv für Papyrusforschung—Lists 4, 6

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 563
